description_long: This is a large, round bed with a plush, upholstered frame in a soft white color. The backrest is semi-circular and deeply tufted, providing a luxurious and inviting appearance. The bed is adorned with four decorative pillows—two in a shiny light blue and two in a yellow floral pattern—arranged against the backrest. A light gray plaid blanket is draped casually over the lower half of the bed, adding a cozy touch. The mattress is thick and appears very soft, seamlessly integrated into the circular frame. The overall design is modern and elegant, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A round, white upholstered bed with a tufted semi-circular backrest, decorative pillows, and a plaid blanket, exuding a modern and luxurious style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full semi-circular tufted backrest, all four pillows, and the plaid blanket draped over the bed.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the backrest and the arrangement of pillows, with the blanket's drape more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back of the bed and the top of the pillows barely visible over the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the curve of the backrest and the blanket's placement, with a clear view of the bed's round shape.
